.anticon {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  color: inherit;
  font-style: normal;
  line-height: 0;
  text-align: center;
  text-transform: none;
  vertical-align: -0.125em;
  text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
}

.anticon > * {
  line-height: 1;
}

.anticon svg {
  display: inline-block;
}

.anticon::before {
  display: none;
}

.anticon .anticon-icon {
  display: block;
}

.anticon[tabindex] {
  cursor: pointer;
}

.anticon-spin::before,
.anticon-spin {
  display: inline-block;
  -webkit-animation: loadingCircle 1s infinite linear;
  animation: loadingCircle 1s infinite linear;
}

@-webkit-keyframes loadingCircle {
  100% {
    -webkit-transform: rotate(360deg);
    transform: rotate(360deg);
  }
}

@keyframes loadingCircle {
  100% {
    -webkit-transform: rotate(360deg);
    transform: rotate(360deg);
  }
}

md:py-8"><h2 id="shop-home-faq-heading" class="m-0 text-[20px] md:text-[24px] font-semibold tracking-tight text-[#070A56] leading-snug">Markaz — common questions</h2><p class="m-0 mt-2 text-[13.5px] md:text-[14.5px] text-[#667085] leading-relaxed max-w-[64ch]">Everything Pakistani shoppers ask before their first Markaz order. Tap a question to expand.</p><div class="mt-4 md:mt-5 divide-y divide-[#EAECF0]"><details class="group py-3 md:py-4 [&_summary::-webkit-details-marker]:hidden"><summary class="flex cursor-pointer items-start justify-between gap-3 list-none"><span class="text-[14.5px] md:text-[15.5px] font-medium text-[#070A56] leading-snug">What is Markaz and how does it work?</span><span aria-hidden="true" class="mt-0.5 inline-flex h-5 w-5 shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-[#98A2B3] transition-transform group-open:rotate-45">+</span></summary><p class="mb-0 mt-2 text-[13.5px] md:text-[14.5px] text-[#475467] leading-relaxed">Markaz is Pakistan's online marketplace — shop millions of products across fashion, beauty, electronics, home and more from thousands of trusted Pakistani sellers. Browse, place your order in Pakistani Rupees, and pay online or cash on delivery. Markaz handles seller payouts, shipping and buyer protection, so you only deal with one party no matter how many sellers your order touches.</p></details><details class="group py-3 md:py-4 [&_summary::-webkit-details-marker]:hidden"><summary class="flex cursor-pointer items-start justify-between gap-3 list-none"><span class="text-[14.5px] md:text-[15.5px] font-medium text-[#070A56] leading-snug">Is cash on delivery available on Markaz?</span><span aria-hidden="true" class="mt-0.5 inline-flex h-5 w-5 shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-[#98A2B3] transition-transform group-open:rotate-45">+</span></summary><p class="mb-0 mt-2 text-[13.5px] md:text-[14.5px] text-[#475467] leading-relaxed">Yes — cash on delivery (COD) is available on Markaz across every major Pakistani city including Karachi, Lahore, Faisalabad, Islamabad, Rawalpindi, Multan, Peshawar and Quetta. You pay in PKR only when the order arrives at your doorstep. No card, no advance payment, no separate seller verification required from your end.</p></details><details class="group py-3 md:py-4 [&_summary::-webkit-details-marker]:hidden"><summary class="flex cursor-pointer items-start justify-between gap-3 list-none"><span class="text-[14.5px] md:text-[15.5px] font-medium text-[#070A56] leading-snug">How long does delivery take on Markaz?</span><span aria-hidden="true" class="mt-0.5 inline-flex h-5 w-5 shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-[#98A2B3] transition-transform group-open:rotate-45">+</span></summary><p class="mb-0 mt-2 text-[13.5px] md:text-[14.5px] text-[#475467] leading-relaxed">Most orders are delivered within 3–5 business days from sellers based in Lahore, Karachi and Faisalabad. Same-city express options are available on selected products. Individual product pages show the live delivery estimate from the seller and the route — always check there for the most accurate window before checkout.</p></details><details class="group py-3 md:py-4 [&_summary::-webkit-details-marker]:hidden"><summary class="flex cursor-pointer items-start justify-between gap-3 list-none"><span class="text-[14.5px] md:text-[15.5px] font-medium text-[#070A56] leading-snug">What is the return policy on Markaz orders?</span><span aria-hidden="true" class="mt-0.5 inline-flex h-5 w-5 shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-[#98A2B3] transition-transform group-open:rotate-45">+</span></summary><p class="mb-0 mt-2 text-[13.5px] md:text-[14.5px] text-[#475467] leading-relaxed">Markaz offers a 7-day return window from the day your order is delivered. If the product doesn't match the description, has a defect, or doesn't fit, request a return through your orders page and the seller will arrange a pickup. Refunds are processed back to your original payment method or as Markaz wallet credit, your choice.</p></details><details class="group py-3 md:py-4 [&_summary::-webkit-details-marker]:hidden"><summary class="flex cursor-pointer items-start justify-between gap-3 list-none"><span class="text-[14.5px] md:text-[15.5px] font-medium text-[#070A56] leading-snug">Can I become a reseller on Markaz?</span><span aria-hidden="true" class="mt-0.5 inline-flex h-5 w-5 shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-[#98A2B3] transition-transform group-open:rotate-45">+</span></summary><p class="mb-0 mt-2 text-[13.5px] md:text-[14.5px] text-[#475467] leading-relaxed">Yes — alongside shopping for yourself, Markaz lets you resell and earn. Sign up to access reseller pricing, share-to-WhatsApp tools, a profit calculator on every product, and a single-shipment workflow when your customer places an order. There's no minimum order — start with a single item — and no upfront inventory, since you only buy what your customer has already paid for.</p></details><details class="group py-3 md:py-4 [&_summary::-webkit-details-marker]:hidden"><summary class="flex cursor-pointer items-start justify-between gap-3 list-none"><span class="text-[14.5px] md:text-[15.5px] font-medium text-[#070A56] leading-snug">Do I need a business registration to sell on Markaz?</span><span aria-hidden="true" class="mt-0.5 inline-flex h-5 w-5 shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-[#98A2B3] transition-transform group-open:rotate-45">+</span></summary><p class="mb-0 mt-2 text-[13.5px] md:text-[14.5px] text-[#475467] leading-relaxed">No business registration is required to start reselling on Markaz. You can sign up with a Pakistani mobile number, list products to your WhatsApp and social channels using the share tools, and start earning a margin on every order your customers place. Markaz handles the supplier transaction, shipping and customer support behind the scenes.</p></details></div></section></div></div><!--$--><!--/$--><!--/$--></div></main><footer class="relative mt-10
